cards.name: Dark Gygax
cards.effect: Must be Special Summoned. Requires a Nuclear Operative and another Syndicate Unit to summon.

cards.name: Mauler
cards.effect: Must be Special Summoned. Requires a Nuclear Operative and another Syndicate Unit to summon.

cards.name: Advanced Pinpointer
cards.effect: Search your deck for an Item card and add it to your hand. You may reveal your chosen card to your opponent.

cards.name: Energy Sword
cards.effect: When activated, choose a Unit you control. It gains 500 ATK while this card is on the field.

cards.name: HONK Operative
cards.effect: When targeted by an enemy attack, flip a coin. If heads, negate that attack and switch the attacking Unit to Defense Position.

cards.name: Dark Lord
cards.effect: During your Battle Phase, flip a coin. If heads, you can attack twice.

cards.name: Sniper
cards.effect: During your Main Phase, choose a Unit your opponent controls. If none of your opponent's Units do not attack during their next Battle Phase, destroy the chosen Unit.

cards.name: Syndicate Medical Cyborg
cards.effect: Once per turn you may either: Flip a coin when a Syndicate faction Unit card is targeted for an attack. If heads, negate that attack. OR, you may send a Syndicate faction card from the Morgue to your Deck.

cards.name: Syndicate Saboteur Cyborg
cards.effect: This Unit is also considered an Engineering Cyborg.

cards.name: ...Clown?
cards.effect: When targeted by an enemy attack or effect, flip a coin. If heads, negate that attack or effect.

cards.name: Headslug
cards.effect: When sent to the Morgue by Battle, mark this card DNR. If possible, search your Deck for a Monkey card and add it to your hand.

cards.name: Changeling
cards.effect: Must be Special Summoned by using a Headslug or Monkey. When this card is destroyed by battle, flip a coin. If heads, add a Headslug from the DNR deck or your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Lesser Form
cards.effect: At any point during either player's turn, you may play this card from your hand. Send a Changeling you control back to your hand and Special Summon a Monkey from your Hand or Deck in its place.

cards.name: Chitinous Armor
cards.effect: Target a Changeling Unit you control. It gains 500 DEF while this card is on the field.

cards.name: Armblade
cards.effect: Target a Changeling Unit you control. It gains 500 ATK while this card is on the field.

cards.name: Spread Infestation
cards.effect: If you control a Changeling Unit, Special Summon a 'Spider' card from your Hand or Deck.

cards.name: Macrobomb Biochip
cards.effect: When one of your Syndicate faction cards is destroyed by Battle, target a Unit of equal or lower Level and destroy it.

cards.name: Space Ninja (MODSuit)
cards.effect: Must be Special Summoned by using a Space Ninja.

cards.name: Syndicate Teleporter
cards.effect: You may play this card when a Unit you control is targeted for an attack or during your Main Phase. Flip a coin. If heads, move your targeted unit to another spot on your field and negate the attack. If tails, send the Unit to the Morgue.

cards.name: Syndicate Recruitment
cards.effect: When this card is activated, search your Deck for 1 to 3 'Syndicate Operatives' and add them to your hand.

cards.name: Gorlex Funding
cards.effect: Search your deck for a 'Nuclear Operative' or 'Jaeger MODsuit Agent' and add it to your hand.

cards.name: War Declaration
cards.effect: If your opponent controls more Units than you, Special Summon a 'Nuclear Operative' or 'Jaeger MODsuit Agent' card from your hand.
